why.title: Why Lulu & Pacho
why.description: We don't sell software: we bring hands-on work, technical judgment, and real field experience.

item1.title: Proven technical experience
item1.description: Professionals with a real track record in infrastructure, networking, and security, not generalists.

item2.title: We scale teams quickly
item2.description: We add specialists to your internal team in short timeframes, without lengthy hiring processes.

item3.title: Real implementations
item3.description: We execute concrete projects: SIEM, Wazuh, Fortinet, migrations, and production rollouts.

item4.title: Commitment to security
item4.description: Every project is executed with security criteria and best practices built in from the start.

item5.title: Operational flexibility
item5.description: We adapt to each client's scope, timelines, and tooling.

item6.title: Specialized professionals
item6.description: Every project is assigned to specialists with hands-on experience in that specific technology.

cta.title: Need to reinforce your technical team?
cta.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you with a concrete proposal.

hero.title: A technical team at the service of yours
hero.description: Lulu & Pacho was created to support companies that need reliable technical capacity, without the friction of traditional hiring.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To extend our clients' technical teams with reliable specialists, bringing real infrastructure and cybersecurity experience exactly when it's needed most.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be the go-to technical partner for small and medium businesses looking to execute IT and security projects with quality and without friction.

values.title: Values
values.description: The principles that guide every project we take on.

item1.title: Trust
item1.description: We act with transparency and responsibility in every environment we touch.

item2.title: Technical excellence
item2.description: We stay up to date and demand quality in every implementation.

item3.title: Commitment
item3.description: We engage with our clients' timelines and goals as if they were our own.

item4.title: Security first
item4.description: Every technical decision considers the impact on our client's security.

item5.title: Closeness
item5.description: Clear, direct communication, without unnecessary jargon.

hero.title: Join Lulu & Pacho
hero.description: We're looking for professionals who enjoy solving real infrastructure and cybersecurity challenges.

intro.title: How we work
intro.text: Our team takes part in concrete projects alongside our clients' technical teams: implementations, migrations, audits, and rollouts. We value autonomy, technical judgment, and ownership of results.

item1.title: Real projects
item1.description: Work on production environments, not lab exercises.

item2.title: Continuous learning
item2.description: Exposure to varied technologies and challenges with every client.

item3.title: Flexibility
item3.description: Collaboration models adapted to each project.

item4.title: Specialized team
item4.description: Work alongside senior professionals in infrastructure and security.

openRoles.title: No open role that fits right now?
openRoles.text: Write to us anyway. We're always getting to know professionals for future projects.

cta.title: Want to be part of the team?
cta.description: Tell us about your experience and the areas you specialize in.

hero.title: Security as the foundation of everything we do
hero.description: Trust is the foundation of our work with critical infrastructure and cybersecurity.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.text: We handle our clients' information with strict confidentiality. We only access the systems and data necessary to execute the agreed project, and within the scope defined with each client.

dataProtection.title: Data protection
dataProtection.text: We apply reasonable technical and organizational controls to safeguard the information we work with, including access control, encryption in transit where applicable, and data minimization.

bestPractices.title: Best practices
bestPractices.text: We follow recognized industry guidelines in our implementations and audits, adapting each recommendation to the client's real context instead of applying generic checklists.

responsibleDisclosure.title: Responsible disclosure
responsibleDisclosure.text: If you find a vulnerability related to our systems or site, please report it responsibly before disclosing it publicly, so we can assess and resolve it.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: This policy describes how we handle the information you share with us.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: At Lulu & Pacho we respect your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through this site, how we use it, and what choices you have.

dataCollected.title: Information we collect
dataCollected.text: Through the contact form we only collect the email address and message you choose to share. We do not use tracking cookies or collect browsing data for advertising purposes.

dataUse.title: How we use information
dataUse.text: We use the information received solely to respond to your inquiry and evaluate a potential collaboration. We do not use your data for any other commercial purpose.

dataSharing.title: Sharing information
dataSharing.text: We do not sell or share your information with third parties, except when strictly necessary to respond to your request or required by law.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You can ask us at any time to delete the information you have submitted through this site.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: If you have questions about this policy, you can reach us through our Contact page.

hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.description: Tell us briefly what you need and we'll get back to you shortly.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us briefly what you need
form.successMessage: Thanks! Your message was sent, we'll get back to you shortly.
form.errorMessage: We couldn't send your message. Please try again in a few minutes.
form.errorRequired: Please fill in the email and message before sending.

note.text: Your message is sent securely to our contact team. We do not share your information with third parties.

footer.description: We extend our clients' technical teams in IT infrastructure and cybersecurity.
